title: RedBox Scan Me
shortDescription: Enterprise event scanning application used for QR-based ticket validation and attendee management.
problem: Event teams required a fast and reliable mobile solution for scanning tickets, validating attendees, and handling event check-ins in real-time under high traffic conditions.
solution: Worked on maintaining and extending the Scan Me application by implementing new features, improving QR scanning workflows, fixing production issues, and increasing application reliability.
architecture: Built with Flutter using Bloc state management, GoRouter navigation, local SQLite storage, deep linking, QR scanning, and Sentry monitoring for production diagnostics.
challenges: Improving scanning stability across devices, handling offline scenarios, optimizing QR workflows, and ensuring reliable performance during large-scale events.
impact: Improved app stability and scanning performance while contributing to a production event management system actively used by RedBox event teams.

title: MedicalDentalBlue
shortDescription: Healthcare and dental clinic mobile application with appointment workflows, media handling, maps integration, multilingual support, and patient-focused digital services.
problem: The clinic required a modern mobile application for improving patient interaction, appointment access, healthcare communication, media delivery, and multilingual accessibility across mobile devices.
solution: Developed and maintained the Flutter application by implementing healthcare-focused features, improving performance, integrating external services, and delivering a scalable patient experience.
architecture: Built with Flutter using Bloc and Provider state management, REST API integrations, Flutter Map, WebView modules, PDF viewing, video playback, localization, notifications, secure local storage, and modular architecture principles.
challenges: Managing complex plugin integrations, handling multimedia workflows, maintaining responsive performance across Android devices, and ensuring stable production releases with multiple external integrations.
impact: Delivered a production-ready healthcare application with multilingual support, appointment workflows, clinic communication systems, multimedia features, and scalable mobile architecture.

title: RedBox Contact Capture
shortDescription: Mobile application for collecting attendee information and managing event contact capture workflows.
problem: RedBox required a reliable mobile platform for capturing attendee information during events and synchronizing collected data efficiently.
solution: Worked on adding new features, maintaining production systems, improving stability, and enhancing the overall user experience of the application.
architecture: Developed with Flutter using REST APIs, SQLite local storage, QR scanning, responsive UI components, and production monitoring with Sentry.
challenges: Handling synchronization reliability, improving app responsiveness during events, and maintaining compatibility across multiple Android devices.
impact: Enhanced application stability and supported event teams with a more reliable attendee capture workflow.

title: RedBox WiFi Technician App
shortDescription: Internal Flutter application developed from scratch for WiFi technicians and event infrastructure diagnostics.
problem: Technicians needed an internal tool for monitoring event connectivity, network diagnostics, and on-site infrastructure management.
solution: Designed and developed a complete Flutter application from scratch focused on network monitoring, diagnostics, and technician workflows.
architecture: Implemented using Flutter with Bloc architecture, interactive maps, geolocation, charts, device diagnostics, and networking tools.
challenges: Building reliable network diagnostic workflows, integrating location services, and visualizing technical metrics in a user-friendly way.
impact: Provided technicians with a centralized internal tool for improving troubleshooting and operational efficiency during events.

title: RedBox Reporting System
shortDescription: Flutter Web reporting platform for internal business analytics and event reporting workflows.
problem: RedBox needed an internal reporting platform capable of processing exported data, generating reports, and visualizing operational statistics.
solution: Developed a Flutter Web reporting system prototype focused on data processing, analytics visualization, CSV/Excel exporting, and business reporting.
architecture: Built using Flutter Web with Bloc architecture, chart visualizations, CSV and Excel processing, reactive streams, and modular clean architecture principles.
challenges: Handling large exported datasets, implementing file processing workflows, and building responsive reporting dashboards optimized for web.
impact: Created a scalable internal reporting solution prototype that streamlined operational reporting and data analysis workflows.

title: iStoma Healthcare Platform
shortDescription: Large-scale healthcare ecosystem with patient management, communication, media processing, OCR, PDF handling, QR scanning, and multi-module clinic workflows.
problem: Healthcare clinics required a scalable mobile platform capable of managing patient records, media uploads, QR workflows, OCR processing, notifications, PDF handling, messaging, and clinic operations across multiple devices and clinics.
solution: Worked on maintaining and expanding multiple production healthcare applications by implementing new features, fixing bugs, improving reliability, upgrading dependencies, and enhancing overall performance and user experience.
architecture: Flutter application architecture using Provider and Bloc patterns, modular package structure, local database caching with SQLite, REST API integrations, OneSignal notifications, OCR modules, QR scanning systems, PDF generation/viewing, secure storage, and device-level integrations.
challenges: Handled large legacy codebases, dependency migrations, plugin compatibility issues, performance optimization, platform-specific issues, media processing complexity, and maintaining stability across many production applications.
impact: Contributed to more than 15 healthcare and clinic applications used in production environments while improving maintainability, feature delivery speed, application stability, and user experience.

title: Aesthetic Kids Clinic
shortDescription: Custom healthcare application developed from scratch for a medical clinic with appointment handling, media support, maps, localization, and patient-focused experience.
problem: The clinic needed a modern mobile application to improve patient interaction, appointment access, communication, and digital healthcare experience.
solution: Built the mobile application from scratch based on provided UI/UX designs while implementing core healthcare functionality, multimedia support, localization, notifications, and clinic interaction systems.
architecture: Flutter application using Bloc and Provider state management, Firebase messaging, localization support, secure storage, maps integration, PDF viewing, media handling, and REST API communication.
challenges: Implemented complex UI screens from design specifications, optimized multimedia handling, integrated notifications and maps, and ensured smooth performance across Android devices.
impact: Successfully delivered a production-ready healthcare application with modern UX, scalable architecture, multilingual support, and reliable patient interaction features.

title: Revocheck
shortDescription: Enterprise Flutter application for inspection, reporting, QR scanning, NFC workflows, and field operations used by international teams.
problem: The application required continuous feature development, bug fixing, and reliability improvements for real-world business workflows involving inspections, authentication, QR/NFC operations, offline data handling, and secure communication with backend services.
solution: Implemented new Flutter features, improved existing workflows, fixed production issues, added test coverage, and contributed to improving application stability and maintainability across Android and iOS platforms.
architecture: Worked within a production Flutter architecture using Bloc state management, dependency injection, REST APIs, local storage, secure storage, Firebase services, offline support, and modular feature separation.
challenges: Worked on a large existing codebase with multiple integrations including NFC, QR scanning, Firebase messaging, local persistence, secure authentication, and complex business workflows while maintaining application reliability for production users.
impact: Contributed to maintaining and improving a production enterprise application by delivering new functionality, improving stability, fixing critical issues, and supporting long-term scalability of the project.
